languages.text: {n}Ваше сознание — осколок. Плывущий в лиловом облаке, он не помнит как видел, слышал или чувствовал. Были ли вы когда-нибудь по-настоящему живы? Или всегда повиновались потоку, не зная оков тела...{/n}

traits.locale_text: Монолог на черном фоне — "Что я? Я что-то чувствую?" К РТ постепенно возвращается осознание бытия.

languages.text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Adrift in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow like this, not bound by the fetters of corporeality...?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваше сознание — осколок. Плывущий в лиловом облаке, он не помнит как видел, слышал или чувствовал. Были ли вы когда-нибудь по-настоящему живы? Или всегда повиновались потоку, не зная оков тела...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Drifting in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow, not bound by the fetters of corporeality?..{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的思维变得四分五裂，漂浮在紫色的云朵中，完全不记得你曾看到、听到、感觉到的一切。你真的存在过吗？还是说，你从始至终都是个不羁的灵魂，完全不受肉体的束缚……？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Adrift in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow like this, not bound by the fetters of corporeality...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的思维变得四分五裂，漂浮在紫色的云朵中，完全不记得你曾看到、听到、感觉到的一切。你真的存在过吗？还是说，你从始至终都是个不羁的灵魂，完全不受肉体的束缚……？{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu mente es como un fragmento suelto. Flota a la deriva en una nube púrpura, y no recuerda haber visto, oído ni sentido nada jamás. ¿Alguna vez estuviste realmente {rt_mf|vivo|viva}? ¿O siempre te dejaste llevar por la corriente como ahora, libre de las ataduras de la corporeidad...?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Adrift in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow like this, not bound by the fetters of corporeality...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu mente es como un fragmento suelto. Flota a la deriva en una nube púrpura, y no recuerda haber visto, oído ni sentido nada jamás. ¿Alguna vez estuviste realmente {mf|vivo|viva}? ¿O siempre te dejaste llevar por la corriente como ahora, libre de las ataduras de la corporeidad...?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zihnin, gevşek bir kıymık gibi. Mor bir bulutta sürüklenirken daha önce ne gördüğünü, duyduğunu ya da hissettiğini hatırlamıyor. Gerçekten hiç yaşamış mıydın? Yoksa her zaman böyle, bedenliliğin prangalarına vurulmadan akışa teslim mi olmuştun?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Adrift in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow like this, not bound by the fetters of corporeality...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zihnin, gevşek bir kıymık gibi. Mor bir bulutta sürüklenirken daha önce ne gördüğünü, duyduğunu ya da hissettiğini hatırlamıyor. Gerçekten hiç yaşamış mıydın? Yoksa her zaman böyle, bedenliliğin prangalarına vurulmadan akışa teslim mi olmuştun?{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの心はバラバラな欠片である。紫色の雲を漂い、かつて見聞きしたもの、感じたものを思い出せない。本当に生きていたのだろうか？あるいは、いつもこのような流れに身を任せて、肉体という束縛などなかったのだろうか？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Adrift in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow like this, not bound by the fetters of corporeality...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの心はバラバラな欠片である。紫色の雲を漂い、かつて見聞きしたもの、感じたものを思い出せない。本当に生きていたのだろうか？あるいは、いつもこのような流れに身を任せて、肉体という束縛などなかったのだろうか？{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre esprit n'est plus qu'un fragment isolé, à la dérive dans un nuage pourpre. Il ne se souvient pas d'avoir déjà vu, entendu ou senti quoi que ce soit. Étiez-vous véritablement en vie auparavant ? Ou vous êtes vous toujours {rt_mf|abandonné|abandonnée} au courant ainsi, sans avoir jamais été {rt_mf|lié|liée} par les entraves de la corporalité... ?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Adrift in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow like this, not bound by the fetters of corporeality...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre esprit n'est plus qu'un fragment isolé, à la dérive dans un nuage pourpre. Il ne se souvient pas d'avoir déjà vu, entendu ou senti quoi que ce soit. Étiez-vous véritablement en vie auparavant ? Ou vous êtes vous toujours {rt_mf|abandonné|abandonnée} au courant ainsi, sans avoir jamais été {rt_mf|lié|liée} par les entraves de la corporalité... ?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein Verstand ist eine lose Scherbe. Er schwebt in einer violetten Wolke und erinnert sich nicht, jemals etwas gesehen, gehört oder gefühlt zu haben. Warst du jemals wirklich am Leben? Oder hast du dich immer nur dem Strom hingegeben, ungebunden durch die Fesseln der Körperlichkeit?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your mind is a loose shard. Adrift in a purple cloud, it does not remember ever seeing, hearing, or feeling anything. Were you ever truly alive? Or did you always surrender to the flow like this, not bound by the fetters of corporeality...?{/n}
